description: Implement all 8 Pencil-designed screens in the hex dashboard. Current implementation doesn't match designs. Control Plane and Navigation partially done; Project Detail, ADR Browser, Config screens not started.
status_note: Control Plane and Navigation partially implemented. Project Detail, ADR Browser, Config screens not started. Design tokens extracted but not fully applied.

phases.name: Control Plane (Pencil Screen 1)
phases.description: Rewrite ControlPlane.tsx to match Pencil card layout: project cards with health/stats/progress, active swarm cards, action buttons. Design tokens: bg #0a0e14, cards #111827, borders #1f2937, accent #22d3ee.

tasks.name: Rewrite ControlPlane.tsx — project cards with health badge, stats row, progress bar
tasks.description: Full-width project cards: folder icon, name, health badge, stats row (files/worktrees/violations), progress bar, last activity timestamp

tasks.name: Active swarm cards — name, percentage, topology badge, project link
Action buttons: Add Project (cyan), New Swarm (outline)

phases.name: Project Detail (Pencil Screen 2)
phases.description: New ProjectDetail.tsx: stats bar (health/files/worktrees/violations), worktree cards (branch, layer, agent, commits, status badge), Analyze + New Worktree buttons.

tasks.name: ProjectDetail stats bar — health ring, file count, worktree count, violations
Worktree cards — branch name, hex layer color, agent, commit list, status badge
tasks.description: Layer colors: Domain=#58a6ff, Ports=#bc8cff, UseCases=#3fb950, Primary=#f0883e, Secondary=#d29922

phases.name: ADR Browser (Pencil Screen 5)
phases.description: New ADRBrowser.tsx: left searchable list with number/title/status badge, center markdown renderer with metadata bar, Edit/Raw toggle.

tasks.name: ADR list panel — searchable list with number, title, status badge
ADR detail panel — markdown renderer with metadata bar
Edit/Raw toggle buttons for ADR content

phases.name: Agent Fleet (Pencil Screen 4)
phases.description: Verify/fix AgentFleet.tsx against Pencil design: LOCAL section with role/project/task/uptime/model cards, REMOTE section with host/transport/inference/latency cards.

tasks.name: LOCAL agent section — cards with role, project, task, uptime, model
REMOTE agent section — cards with host, transport, inference, latency

phases.name: Config: Blueprint (Pencil Screen 6)
phases.description: New ConfigBlueprint.tsx: layer cards with hex colors and import rules, boundary rules list with shield icons.

tasks.name: Layer cards — colored by hex layer with import rule summaries
Boundary rules list with shield icons and violation indicators

phases.name: Config: MCP Tools (Pencil Screen 7)
phases.description: New ConfigMCPTools.tsx: server cards with status dots, tool count, expandable tool badges.

tasks.name: MCP server cards — status dot, name, tool count, tool badges
